summary: No correctness bug stood out in `buildSessionRequest`, the dropdown default, or the TS bias mirror itself, but the new `/api/orchestrator/place` front door is still backed by repo seed files rather than live orchestrator state, so Dev Env sessions can be placed onto the wrong persona/model as soon as the installed modes/router diverge from seed defaults.

findings.title: Orchestrator placement is still hardwired to seed config, not the live installed modes/router
findings.recommendation: Resolve `modesDir` and routing config from the active installed fitting/configuration that the runner/gateway actually use, instead of `fittings/seed/...`. As written, the UI is calling a live HTTP route, but placement decisions still come from repo defaults, so customized live routing or mode config will be ignored.
